caption: In a formal assembly hall with green upholstered seating and wooden desks, a man with glasses, a bald head, and a beard sits attentively. He is dressed in a white long-sleeved shirt layered with a black sleeveless vest. Behind him, other individuals are partially visible, including one person wearing a bright yellow garment. The man remains largely stationary across the sequence, gazing slightly to his right with a neutral expression. His hands are resting on the desk in front of him. The lighting is bright and consistent, and the background consists of rows of similar seating and wooden partitions. No movement occurs between the frames other than subtle shifts in his posture and gaze, and there is no on-screen text or logos visible in the scene.
